name: Nginx 中间件基线 (CIS Benchmark 1.0 + 等保 2.0)
description: Nginx 安全配置基线. 适用 nginx 1.18+. 参考 CIS Nginx Benchmark 1.0 + DevSec Hardening Framework.

rules.title: 运行用户不应为 root
rules.description: Nginx master 进程必须以 root 启动监听 80/443, 但 worker 必须降权为非 root 用户 (典型 nginx/www-data).

fix.suggestion: /etc/nginx/nginx.conf 第一行 设置: user nginx; 重启 systemctl reload nginx
fix.command: set -e; F=/etc/nginx/nginx.conf; [ -f "$F.mxbak" ] || cp "$F" "$F.mxbak"; if grep -Eq '^\s*user\s+' "$F"; then sed -i -E 's|^\s*user\s+.*;|user nginx;|' "$F"; else sed -i '1i user nginx;' "$F"; fi; if ! nginx -t >/dev/null 2>&1; then mv "$F.mxbak" "$F"; exit 1; fi

rules.title: 关闭 server_tokens
rules.description: 默认 Nginx 在响应头 Server: nginx/1.x.x 泄露版本号, 攻击者可针对版本漏洞攻击.

fix.command: set -e; F=/etc/nginx/nginx.conf; [ -f "$F.mxbak" ] || cp "$F" "$F.mxbak"; if grep -Eq '^\s*server_tokens\s+' "$F"; then sed -i -E 's|^(\s*)server_tokens\s+.*;|\1server_tokens off;|' "$F"; else sed -i -E '0,/^\s*http\s*\{/s/^(\s*http\s*\{)/\1\n    server_tokens off;/' "$F"; fi; if ! nginx -t >/dev/null 2>&1; then mv "$F.mxbak" "$F"; exit 1; fi

rules.title: 禁用 SSLv2/SSLv3/TLSv1.0/TLSv1.1
rules.description: SSLv2/3 + TLSv1.0/1.1 含已知漏洞 (POODLE/BEAST), 等保三级要求最低 TLSv1.2.

fix.suggestion: server {} 段加: ssl_protocols TLSv1.2 TLSv1.3;
fix.command: set -e; F=/etc/nginx/nginx.conf; [ -f "$F.mxbak" ] || cp "$F" "$F.mxbak"; if grep -Eq '^\s*ssl_protocols\s+' "$F"; then sed -i -E 's|^(\s*)ssl_protocols\s+.*;|\1ssl_protocols TLSv1.2 TLSv1.3;|' "$F"; else sed -i -E '0,/^\s*http\s*\{/s/^(\s*http\s*\{)/\1\n    ssl_protocols TLSv1.2 TLSv1.3;/' "$F"; fi; if ! nginx -t >/dev/null 2>&1; then mv "$F.mxbak" "$F"; exit 1; fi

rules.title: 强密码套件
rules.description: 禁用 DES/RC4/MD5/EXPORT 等弱套件.

fix.suggestion: ssl_ciphers 仅保留 ECDHE-RSA-AES128-GCM-SHA256 等强套件; ssl_prefer_server_ciphers on;
fix.command: set -e; F=/etc/nginx/nginx.conf; [ -f "$F.mxbak" ] || cp "$F" "$F.mxbak"; CIPHERS='ECDHE-ECDSA-AES128-GCM-SHA256:ECDHE-RSA-AES128-GCM-SHA256:ECDHE-ECDSA-AES256-GCM-SHA384:ECDHE-RSA-AES256-GCM-SHA384'; if grep -Eq '^\s*ssl_ciphers\s+' "$F"; then sed -i -E "s|^(\s*)ssl_ciphers\s+.*;|\1ssl_ciphers $CIPHERS;|" "$F"; else sed -i -E "0,/^\s*http\s*\{/s/^(\s*http\s*\{)/\1\n    ssl_ciphers $CIPHERS;/" "$F"; fi; if grep -Eq '^\s*ssl_prefer_server_ciphers\s+' "$F"; then sed -i -E 's|^(\s*)ssl_prefer_server_ciphers\s+.*;|\1ssl_prefer_server_ciphers on;|' "$F"; else sed -i -E '0,/^\s*http\s*\{/s/^(\s*http\s*\{)/\1\n    ssl_prefer_server_ciphers on;/' "$F"; fi; if ! nginx -t >/dev/null 2>&1; then mv "$F.mxbak" "$F"; exit 1; fi

rules.title: 启用 HSTS
rules.description: HTTP Strict Transport Security 强制浏览器只走 HTTPS, 防中间人.

fix.command: set -e; F=/etc/nginx/nginx.conf; [ -f "$F.mxbak" ] || cp "$F" "$F.mxbak"; if grep -q 'Strict-Transport-Security' "$F"; then sed -i -E 's|^(\s*)add_header\s+Strict-Transport-Security.*;|\1add_header Strict-Transport-Security "max-age=31536000; includeSubDomains" always;|' "$F"; else sed -i -E '0,/^\s*http\s*\{/s/^(\s*http\s*\{)/\1\n    add_header Strict-Transport-Security "max-age=31536000; includeSubDomains" always;/' "$F"; fi; if ! nginx -t >/dev/null 2>&1; then mv "$F.mxbak" "$F"; exit 1; fi

rules.title: 禁用 autoindex
rules.description: autoindex on 会列出目录内容, 信息泄露.

fix.suggestion: 确认所有 server / location 段无 autoindex on;
fix.command: set -e; F=/etc/nginx/nginx.conf; [ -f "$F.mxbak" ] || cp "$F" "$F.mxbak"; sed -i -E 's|^(\s*)autoindex\s+on;|\1autoindex off;|' "$F"; if ! nginx -t >/dev/null 2>&1; then mv "$F.mxbak" "$F"; exit 1; fi

rules.title: 配置文件权限 ≤ 640
rules.description: nginx.conf 不应世界可读 (含 ssl key 路径 / 上游凭证).

fix.command: set -e; F=/etc/nginx/nginx.conf; chmod 640 "$F"; if getent group nginx >/dev/null 2>&1; then chown root:nginx "$F"; elif getent group www-data >/dev/null 2>&1; then chown root:www-data "$F"; fi

rules.title: SSL 私钥权限 = 400
rules.description: 私钥仅 owner 可读, 防泄漏.

param: for k in /etc/nginx/ssl/server.key /etc/ssl/private/server.key; do [ -f "$k" ] && [ "$(stat -c %a "$k")" != 400 ] && exit 1; done; echo OK

fix.command: set -e; for K in /etc/nginx/ssl/server.key /etc/ssl/private/server.key; do if [ -f "$K" ]; then chmod 400 "$K"; fi; done

set -e; F=/etc/nginx/nginx.conf; [ -f "$F.mxbak" ] || cp "$F" "$F.mxbak"; if grep -q 'X-Frame-Options' "$F"; then sed -i -E 's|^(\s*)add_header\s+X-Frame-Options.*;|\1add_header X-Frame-Options SAMEORIGIN always;|' "$F"; else sed -i -E '0,/^\s*http\s*\{/s/^(\s*http\s*\{)/\1\n    add_header X-Frame-Options SAMEORIGIN always;/' "$F"; fi; if ! nginx -t >/dev/null 2>&1; then mv "$F.mxbak" "$F"; exit 1; fi

set -e; F=/etc/nginx/nginx.conf; [ -f "$F.mxbak" ] || cp "$F" "$F.mxbak"; if grep -q 'X-Content-Type-Options' "$F"; then sed -i -E 's|^(\s*)add_header\s+X-Content-Type-Options.*;|\1add_header X-Content-Type-Options nosniff always;|' "$F"; else sed -i -E '0,/^\s*http\s*\{/s/^(\s*http\s*\{)/\1\n    add_header X-Content-Type-Options nosniff always;/' "$F"; fi; if ! nginx -t >/dev/null 2>&1; then mv "$F.mxbak" "$F"; exit 1; fi

rules.title: 配置 limit_req
rules.description: 防 CC 攻击/暴力破解.

fix.suggestion: http {} 段加 limit_req_zone $binary_remote_addr zone=one:10m rate=10r/s;
fix.command: set -e; F=/etc/nginx/nginx.conf; [ -f "$F.mxbak" ] || cp "$F" "$F.mxbak"; if ! grep -Eq '^\s*limit_req_zone\s+' "$F"; then sed -i -E '0,/^\s*http\s*\{/s/^(\s*http\s*\{)/\1\n    limit_req_zone $binary_remote_addr zone=one:10m rate=10r\/s;/' "$F"; fi; if ! nginx -t >/dev/null 2>&1; then mv "$F.mxbak" "$F"; exit 1; fi

rules.title: client_max_body_size 合理上限
rules.description: 默认 1m 太低导致业务异常, 过高导致 DoS. 推荐 ≤ 50m.

fix.command: set -e; F=/etc/nginx/nginx.conf; [ -f "$F.mxbak" ] || cp "$F" "$F.mxbak"; if grep -Eq '^\s*client_max_body_size\s+' "$F"; then sed -i -E 's|^(\s*)client_max_body_size\s+.*;|\1client_max_body_size 50m;|' "$F"; else sed -i -E '0,/^\s*http\s*\{/s/^(\s*http\s*\{)/\1\n    client_max_body_size 50m;/' "$F"; fi; if ! nginx -t >/dev/null 2>&1; then mv "$F.mxbak" "$F"; exit 1; fi
